rows.snippet: List of Changes for Laserfiche WebLink 11 Update 2. 3 years ago https://support.laserfiche.com/kb/1014456/list-of-changes-for-laserfiche-weblink-11-update-2- WebLink 11 Summary This article details the list of changes for Laserfiche WebLink... https://support.laserfiche.com/kb/1014456/list-of-changes-for-las ...
rows.title: List of Changes for Laserfiche WebLink 11 Update 2.
rows.detailTitle: List of Changes for Laserfiche WebLink 11 Update 2.
rows.detailText: Product Support Learn Blake Smith List of Changes for Laserfiche WebLink 11 Update 2. Product: WebLink 11 KB: 1014456 Published: June 6, 2023 Last Updated: June 6, 2023 Summary This article details the list of changes for Laserfiche WebLink 11 update 2. The update includes the following changes for Laserfiche WebLink: Security updates and stability enhancements. (426138) Improved how the site handles session timeouts. (424166, 424284) The welcome page search now treats search phrases enclosed in double quotes as a phrase search. (419173) In certain situations, you could receive a "vdirName cannot be empty" error message when signing in. This issue is now resolved. (420298) The update includes the following files for WebLink: WebLink.dll (11.0.2306.28) WebLinkControls.dll (11.0.2306.28) WebLinkCommon.dll (11.0.2306.28) WLWebDesigner.dll (11.0.2306.28) icudt62.dll (62.1.0.2) icuin62.dll (62.1.0.0) icuuc62.dll (62.1.0.0) main.585cf12411d4d409fe71.js main.0c94a6b53befe1dcd7f9.js main.07d482e5d16b670c2bd2.js main.f7f8e06c46080e590055.js main.fcd74090645b76d4d2ac.js styles.css Resolution Click the following link to download a zip file containing the update. KB1014456.zip On the computer where Laserfiche WebLink 11 is installed, extract and run Lf_WebLink_x64_110230628_KB1014456.msp Related Links 1014439 WebLink 11 Updates 1014438 List of Changes for Laserfiche WebLink 11 Update 1. Share 2026 Laserfiche Privacy Trademark

rows.snippet: List of Changes for WebLink 11 4 years ago List of Changes for WebLink 11 December 1, 2021 | KB: 1014330 https://support.laserfiche.com/kb/1014330/list-of-changes-for-weblink-11 WebLink 11 Summary WebLink 11 include... https://support.laserfiche.com/kb/1014330/list-of-changes-for-web ...
rows.title: List of Changes for WebLink 11
rows.detailText: Product Support Learn Sign in List of Changes for WebLink 11 Product: WebLink 11 KB: 1014330 Published: November 30, 2021 Last Updated: December 1, 2021 Summary WebLink 11 includes a number of bug fixes and security and performance enhancements.. More Information Resolved an issue that could prevent documents from loading when opening them from a URL. (110183) In some cases, search forms containing dropdown lists of fields returned incorrect results. This issue has been resolved. (276817) Resolved an issue in which searches opened from URLs incorrectly produce a "An end-of-file or end-of-input was encountered unexpectedly. Check for unterminated strings and open parentheses or brackets. [9091]" when field name contains symbol "#" error. (233595) Default values are now correctly included when performing searches. (398737) Resolved an issue that could cause the folder browser breadcrumbs to fail to load and produce a 504 error. (349663) Searches containing blank spaces between wildcards no longer fail with a "The search term you entered is invalid" error. (198559) In some cases, not all entries in a folder would be loaded. This issue has been resolved. (207926) Document relationships now correctly sort by name in the document viewer. (250803) Resolved an issue that prevented searches performed on the Welcome page that contained quotes from returning results. (285414) In some cases, WebLink would remove port data from URLs, resulting in a 404 error. This issue has been resolved. (295569) Users with the Export or Print feature right can now print PDFs opened from the document viewer. (86259) Resolved an issue that could prevent the last thumbnail of an imaged document from loading. (282438) Some pages did not display when viewed in Chrome or Edge 9.2. This issue has been resolved. (337809) Variable names in search forms that contain spaces or underscores now resolve correctly. (66327) Very large header images are now scaled to allow documents to be viewed correctly. (41694) Resolved an issue that could prevent a user from seeing all entries in the folder browser or search when viewing on a display with certain resolutions. (324896) Custom links and searching from the Welcome page now work correctly when WebLink is configured for auto-login. (225807, 230040)) Resolved an issue that could cause some search parameters to be ignored when using search forms. (225750) Special characters on the Welcome page now display properly. (183649) In some cases, customized column displays did not display the selected columns. This issue has been resolved. (40101) Resolved an issue that could prevent the repository selection dropdown from being displayed when multiple repositories are configured. (91500) Search results are now correctly returned when fields in a search form are blank. (250939) Search forms now load properly when the search form name contains accented characters. (247128) In some cases, documents that have been modified while a WebLink user is logged in will subsequently fail to load with a "Error loading thumbnail data. [0]" error. This issue has been resolved. (124651) Document relationships now display correctly when accessing WebLink using an iPhone. (182256) Resolved an issue that could cause some error message to be incorrectly logged as critical errors. (92846) Welcome page text now correctly displays carriage returns. (259801) In some cases, PDFs would display as broken or missing images. This issue has been resolved. (264086) Resolved an issue that could prevent users from seeing redacted text even when they had been granted the correct rights. (307446) URLs linking to shortcut entries in the repository now correctly display the target document. (315866) In some cases, URLs that run a search produced inconsistent search results. This issue has been resolved. (32848) As of Laserfiche 10, users must set a default repository connection. (86342) Removed support for Windows Server 2008, Windows 7, Windows Server 2008 R2, Windows 8, and Internet Explorer. Security enhancements. (237058, 101240, 151521, 151522, 305609) Related Links 1014329 Release Notes for WebLink 11. 2026 Laserfiche Privacy Trademark

rows.snippet: Release Notes for Workflow 11 5 years ago https://support.laserfiche.com/kb/1014246/release-notes-for-workflow-11 Workflow Summary Laserfiche Workflow 11 includes various feature improvements and bug fixes. For a d... https://support.laserfiche.com/kb/1014246/release-notes-for-workflow ...
rows.title: Release Notes for Workflow 11
rows.detailText: Product Support Learn Blake Smith Release Notes for Workflow 11 Product: Workflow KB: 1014246 Published: March 4, 2021 Last Updated: June 15, 2021 Summary Laserfiche Workflow 11 includes various feature improvements and bug fixes. For a detailed list of changes, please see Knowledge Base article 1014245. System Requirements Supported Operating Systems Windows 8.1 Windows 10 Windows Server 2012 Windows Server 2012 R2 Windows Server 2016 Windows Server 2019 Note: 32-bit and 64-bit versions supported for all Workflow 10 and higher components. Note: If you are running Windows Server 2012, you must install .NET Framework 4.8 before installing Workflow. Requirements for the Workflow Designer Minimum: CPU 1GHz, 512MB RAM. Recommended: CPU 2.4GHz, 1GB RAM or higher. Requirements for the Workflow Server and Subscriber Minimum: CPU 2.4GHz, 1GB RAM. Recommended: 2, 4, 6, or 8-core CPU, based on need. 4GB RAM or higher. More CPU cores allow more workflows to run simultaneously. Software Requirements Windows Components Windows Message Queuing component: This component must be manually installed on the machine(s) hosting the Workflow Server and Subscriber. Microsoft .NET Framework 4.8: This component will automatically be installed during the Workflow installation if it is not installed. Windows Components Necessary for the Workflow Web Service IIS (Internet Information Services): This component must be manually installed on the computer hosting the Workflow Web Service. Note: You must install IIS 7 or higher. IIS Basic Authentication and Windows Authentication: This component must be manually installed on the computer hosting the Workflow Web Service. ASP.NET: This component must be manually installed on the computer hosting the Workflow Web Service. Note: If you are running Windows 8 or Windows Server 2012, you must install the ASP.NET 4.5 feature in IIS. On Windows 10 or Windows Server 2016, the feature may be listed as ASP.NET 4.6 or 4.7. Windows Components for Workflow Web IIS 7 or higher (Internet Information Services): This component must be manually installed on the computer hosting Laserfiche Workflow Web. IIS Windows Authentication: This component must be manually installed on the computer hosting the Workflow Web. ASP.NET 4.5, 4.6, or 4.7: This component must be manually installed on the computer hosting Workflow Web. Web Browser: Internet Explorer 9 or later (Internet Explorer 10 or later recommended), Firefox 24, Chrome 30, Safari Supported Database Management Systems SQL Server 2014 SP3 SQL Server 2016 SQL Server 2017 SQL Server 2019 Note: Express editions of the SQL Server versions listed above are also supported but not recommended for high-volume Workflow installations. Note: Oracle DBMS are no longer supported. If you are upgrading from a previous version of Workflow, installation of SQL Server will be required. Laserfiche Components Laserfiche Server 8.0 or higher (Laserfiche Server 8.3.1 or higher is recommended.) Note: To use all aspects of the business process feature, you must have Laserfiche Server 9.0 or higher and the Laserfiche Client 9.0 and/or Web Access 9.0 or higher and/or Web Client. Component Known Issue Workflow Whitepapers The whitepapers "Building Custom Activities in Workflow" for both C# and VB contain examples using Visual Studio 2010 and .NET Framework 4. Workflow 11 and newer require Visual Studio 2019 and .NET Framework 4.8 or newer. Workflow Installation The Workflow Designer erroneously shows version 10.4.2 in its warning message when connecting to a workflow server with a version less than 10.4.3 (279708). Workflow Installation If you upgrade from Workflow 8.3.2 to Workflow 9.0.x and then immediately upgrade to Workflow 9.1 or later without first using the Workflow 9.0.x configuration manager to configure Workflow, the Workflow 9.1 or later upgrade may not retain your Workflow Server settings from Workflow 8.3.2. You can upgrade from Workflow 8.3.2 to Workflow 9.1 or later. You do not need to do an intermediate upgrade to Workflow 9.0.x. (110343) Workflow Installation If you installed your Workflow Server and Subscriber on different computers, additional Microsoft Message Queuing configuration may be required. See the Workflow 9.1 Installation Guide for specific instructions. (78523) Workflow Installation If you installed your Workflow Server and Subscriber on different computers, you may need to provide domain authentication instead of using Local System Account when configuring the Workflow Subscriber. (77933) Workflow Installation When using the Repair option to restore assemblies that were deleted from the GAC, the process may fail. Repairing it a second time will succeed. (70389) Workflow Installation When upgrading to Workflow 9 or later, if the Workflow 8.3 uninstall process fails, it must be manually uninstalled by running the original installer. (95866) Workflow Installation Uninstalling Workflow does not deactivate your license. Prior to uninstalling, you must delete
